name: super-business-shop-tests
description: Automated QA test suite for Super Business Shop

scripts.test:auth: node -e "const h=require('./test/helpers');const c=require('./test/config');const {chromium}=require('playwright');(async()=>{const b=await chromium.launch({headless:false});const ctx=await b.newContext({viewport:{width:1440,height:900},recordVideo:{dir:'test/videos/flows/',size:{width:1440,height:900}}});const p=await ctx.newPage();p.setDefaultTimeout(30000);await require('./test/tests/01_auth')(p,h,c);await ctx.close();await b.close()})().catch(console.error)"
scripts.test:pos: node -e "const h=require('./test/helpers');const c=require('./test/config');const {chromium}=require('playwright');(async()=>{const b=await chromium.launch({headless:false});const ctx=await b.newContext({viewport:{width:1440,height:900},recordVideo:{dir:'test/videos/flows/',size:{width:1440,height:900}}});const p=await ctx.newPage();p.setDefaultTimeout(30000);await require('./test/tests/05_pos')(p,h,c);await ctx.close();await b.close()})().catch(console.error)"
scripts.clean: rmdir /s /q test\images test\videos test\reports test\manual 2>nul & echo Cleaned
